lessons.title: Be Strong and of Good Courage
lessons.gloss: Be strong and of good courage.
lessons.focus: Short, weighty covenant-commission verse. Reinforce ח־ז־ק from Journey 2 lesson 56. Introduce א־מ־צ (to be brave). This imperative pair will repeat three times in Joshua 1.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites chazak ve-ematz from memory.

lessons.title: Turn Not from It to Right or Left
lessons.gloss: Turn not from it to the right hand or to the left.
lessons.focus: Reinforce ס־ו־ר from Journey 2 lesson 55. Introduce יָמִין (right hand) and שְׂמֹאל (left hand).

games.raw: Chant Along, Directional Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child names right and left in Hebrew.

lessons.title: Meditate on the Torah Day and Night
lessons.gloss: And you shall meditate on it day and night.
lessons.focus: Introduce ה־ג־ה (to meditate, murmur). Introduce the adverbial yomam (by day). Echoes of Psalm 1.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: The People Passed Over

verse.hebrew: וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל עֹבְרִים בֶּחָרֶבָה עַד אֲשֶׁר־תַּמּוּ כָּל־הַגּוֹי לַעֲבֹר אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּן
verse.translit: ve-chol-Yisrael ovrim be-charava ad asher-tamu kol-ha-goi la'avor et-ha-Yarden

lessons.gloss: And all Israel passed over on dry ground, until all the nation had finished crossing the Jordan.
lessons.focus: Reinforce ע־ב־ר (to pass over, from Journey 3 lesson 53). Introduce ת־מ־מ (to be complete) and חָרָבָה (dry ground). Strong echo of Exodus 14.

games.raw: Chant Along, Intertextual Echo Highlight (Exodus 14 parallel), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child names the Red Sea parallel.

lessons.title: Twelve Stones for a Memorial

verse.hebrew: וְהָיוּ הָאֲבָנִים הָאֵלֶּה לְזִכָּרוֹן לִבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל עַד־עוֹלָם
verse.translit: ve-hayu ha-avanim ha-eleh le-zikaron li-vnei Yisrael ad-olam

lessons.gloss: And these stones shall be a memorial to the children of Israel forever.
lessons.focus: Reinforce zikaron from Journey 3 lesson 28. Reinforce אֶבֶן (stone) in plural.

games.raw: Chant Along, Covenant Vocabulary Review (zikaron glows), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes zikaron and names Passover as another zikaron.

lessons.title: Take Off Your Sandals

verse.hebrew: שַׁל־נַעַלְךָ מֵעַל רַגְלֶךָ כִּי הַמָּקוֹם אֲשֶׁר אַתָּה עֹמֵד עָלָיו קֹדֶשׁ הוּא
verse.translit: shal-na'alcha me-al raglecha ki ha-makom asher ata omed alav kodesh hu

lessons.gloss: Take off your sandal from your foot, for the place on which you are standing is holy.
lessons.focus: Exact echo of Exodus 3:5 (Journey 3 lesson 10). The child recognizes the verse. This is a deliberate convergent moment.

games.raw: Chant Along, Echo Recognition Highlight, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child names the Exodus 3:5 parallel from memory.

lessons.title: The Walls Fell Down

verse.hebrew: וַיָּרֵעוּ הָעָם וַיִּתְקְעוּ בַּשֹּׁפָרוֹת וַתִּפֹּל הַחוֹמָה תַּחְתֶּיהָ
verse.translit: va-yare'u ha-am va-yitke'u ba-shofarot va-tipol ha-choma tachteha

lessons.gloss: And the people shouted and blew the trumpets, and the wall fell down.
lessons.focus: Introduce ר־ו־ע (to shout) in Hiphil. Introduce ת־ק־ע (to blow) in Qal. Introduce שׁוֹפָר (ram's horn) and חוֹמָה (wall).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Choose You This Day
lessons.gloss: Choose this day whom you will serve.
lessons.focus: Introduce ב־ח־ר (to choose). Reinforce ע־ב־ד. The paragogic nun on ta'avodun (poetic / emphatic form). Joshua's farewell covenant-renewal.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: They Forsook the LORD
lessons.gloss: And they forsook the LORD, God of their fathers.
lessons.focus: Reinforce ע־ז־ב from Journey 4 lesson 11. The Judges cycle opens.

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: The LORD Raised Up Judges

verse.hebrew: וַיָּקֶם יְהוָה שֹׁפְטִים וַיּוֹשִׁיעוּם מִיַּד שֹׁסֵיהֶם
verse.translit: va-yakem YHVH shoftim va-yoshi'um mi-yad shoseihem

lessons.gloss: And the LORD raised up judges, and they saved them from the hand of their plunderers.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Hiphil va-yakem from k-v-m. Introduce שׁ־פ־ט (to judge) as Qal active participle. Reinforce y-sh-a in Hiphil (yoshi'um, they delivered them).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes shofet and connects it to mishpat (judgment).

lessons.title: Deborah the Prophetess

verse.hebrew: וּדְבוֹרָה אִשָּׁה נְבִיאָה הִיא שֹׁפְטָה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵל בָּעֵת הַהִיא
verse.translit: u-Dvora isha nevi'a hi shofta et-Yisrael ba-et ha-hi

lessons.gloss: And Deborah, a prophetess, was judging Israel at that time.
lessons.focus: Introduce נְבִיאָה (prophetess, feminine of navi). Introduce the Qal active participle feminine singular shofta.

games.raw: Chant Along, Gender Sort (masculine vs feminine participle), Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Awake, Awake, Deborah

verse.hebrew: עוּרִי עוּרִי דְּבוֹרָה עוּרִי עוּרִי דַּבְּרִי־שִׁיר
verse.translit: uri uri Dvora uri uri dabri-shir

lessons.gloss: Awake, awake, Deborah, awake, awake, utter a song.
lessons.focus: Introduce ע־ו־ר (to awake) in Qal feminine imperative. Reinforce ד־ב־ר in Piel feminine imperative. The song of Deborah, a very ancient piece of Hebrew poetry.

games.raw: Chant Along, Feminine Imperative Chain, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: The LORD Is with Thee
lessons.gloss: The LORD is with you, mighty man of valor.
lessons.focus: Introduce גִּבּוֹר (mighty one) and חַיִל (strength, valor).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Peace Be Unto Thee
lessons.gloss: Peace be to you, do not fear.
lessons.focus: Short, weighty verse. Reinforce shalom and al-tira. The standard divine reassurance formula.

games.raw: Chant Along, Formula Highlight (do-not-fear is a divine formula across Tanakh), Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: The LORD Our Peace

verse.hebrew: וַיִּבֶן שָׁם גִּדְעוֹן מִזְבֵּחַ לַיהוָה וַיִּקְרָא־לוֹ יְהוָה שָׁלוֹם
verse.translit: va-yiven sham Gid'on mizbeach la-YHVH va-yikra-lo YHVH shalom

lessons.gloss: And Gideon built there an altar to the LORD and called it YHVH Shalom.
lessons.focus: Reinforce b-n-h and the altar-building formula from Genesis 12:8. Reinforce shalom. A divine-name-of-place formula.

games.raw: Chant Along, Divine Name Highlight, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 24 and names other divine-name-of-place formulas (YHVH Yireh in Genesis 22).

lessons.title: A Sword for the LORD and for Gideon
lessons.gloss: A sword for the LORD and for Gideon.
lessons.focus: Short, memorable battle-cry. Reinforce cherev.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Hannah Prayed

verse.hebrew: וְהִיא מָרַת נָפֶשׁ וַתִּתְפַּלֵּל עַל־יְהוָה וּבָכֹה תִבְכֶּה
verse.translit: ve-hi marat nafesh va-titpalel al-YHVH u-vacho tivkeh

lessons.gloss: And she was bitter of soul and prayed to the LORD and wept bitterly.
lessons.focus: Reinforce Hithpael of p-l-l from Journey 4 lesson 5. Introduce מַר (bitter). Reinforce the emphatic infinitive absolute plus imperfect (bacho tivkeh, surely she wept).

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: My Heart Rejoices in the LORD

verse.hebrew: עָלַץ לִבִּי בַּיהוָה רָמָה קַרְנִי בַּיהוָה
verse.translit: alatz libi ba-YHVH rama karni ba-YHVH

lessons.gloss: My heart rejoices in the LORD, my horn is exalted in the LORD.
lessons.focus: Introduce ע־ל־צ (to rejoice). Introduce the horn-of-strength metaphor (karni, my horn).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort (joy-verbs now four: s-m-ch, g-y-l, r-n-n, a-l-tz), Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Samuel, Samuel

verse.hebrew: וַיָּבֹא יְהוָה וַיִּתְיַצַּב וַיִּקְרָא כְפַעַם־בְּפַעַם שְׁמוּאֵל שְׁמוּאֵל
verse.translit: va-yavo YHVH va-yityatzav va-yikra ke-fa'am-be-fa'am Shmuel Shmuel

lessons.gloss: And the LORD came and stood and called as at other times, Samuel, Samuel.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Hithpael va-yityatzav (he stationed himself). Introduce פַּעַם (time, occurrence).

roots.raw: י־צ־ב (to station, in Hithpael to present oneself).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Speak, for Thy Servant Heareth
lessons.gloss: Speak, for your servant hears.
lessons.focus: Short, weighty response. Reinforce the Piel imperative daber. Reinforce the Qal participle shomea.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Give Us a King
lessons.gloss: Give us a king to judge us.
lessons.focus: Reinforce n-t-n imperative. Reinforce the infinitive construct with suffix le-shoftenu (to judge us). The king-request moment.

games.raw: Chant Along, Infinitive Plus Suffix Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: To Obey Is Better than Sacrifice

verse.hebrew: הִנֵּה שְׁמֹעַ מִזֶּבַח טוֹב לְהַקְשִׁיב מֵחֵלֶב אֵילִים
verse.translit: hineh shmoa mi-zevach tov le-hakshiv me-chelev eilim

lessons.gloss: Behold, to hear is better than sacrifice, to hearken than the fat of rams.
lessons.focus: Introduce the infinitive construct shmoa (to hear). Introduce חֵלֶב (fat) and אַיִל (ram). A major prophetic theme.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Man Looks at the Outward Appearance

verse.hebrew: הָאָדָם יִרְאֶה לַעֵינַיִם וַיהוָה יִרְאֶה לַלֵּבָב
verse.translit: ha-adam yir'eh la-einayim va-YHVH yir'eh la-levav

lessons.gloss: Man looks at the eyes, but the LORD looks at the heart.
lessons.focus: Reinforce r-a-h. Reinforce the heart / eyes contrast. Reinforce levav (extended heart form from Journey 3 lesson 63).

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: I Come in the Name of the LORD

verse.hebrew: אָנֹכִי בָא אֵלֶיךָ בְּשֵׁם יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת
verse.translit: anochi va elecha be-shem YHVH tzeva'ot

lessons.gloss: I come against you in the name of the LORD of hosts.
lessons.focus: Introduce צְבָאוֹת (hosts, armies). A new divine-title expansion: YHVH Tzeva'ot.

roots.raw: צ־ב־א (to go to war, serve, assemble).

games.raw: Chant Along, Divine Title Highlight, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: The LORD Is My Shepherd
lessons.gloss: The LORD is my shepherd, I shall not lack.
lessons.focus: Introduce ר־ע־ה (to shepherd). Introduce ח־ס־ר (to lack). The opening of Psalm 23, which the child now has the Hebrew to begin reading in its original language.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward (the most famous Hebrew psalm verse), Verse Builder.

lessons.title: He Leads Me Beside Still Waters

verse.hebrew: בִּנְאוֹת דֶּשֶׁא יַרְבִּיצֵנִי עַל־מֵי מְנֻחוֹת יְנַהֲלֵנִי
verse.translit: bi-n'ot deshe yarbitzeni al-mei menuchot yenahaleni

lessons.gloss: In pastures of grass he makes me lie down, beside waters of rest he leads me.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Hiphil yarbitzeni (he makes me lie down, from r-v-tz). Introduce the Piel yenahaleni (he leads me, from n-h-l). Introduce מְנוּחָה (rest).

roots.raw: ר־ב־צ (to lie down), נ־ה־ל (to lead gently), נ־ו־ח (rest).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Though I Walk Through the Valley

verse.hebrew: גַּם כִּי־אֵלֵךְ בְּגֵיא צַלְמָוֶת לֹא־אִירָא רָע כִּי־אַתָּה עִמָּדִי
verse.translit: gam ki-elech be-gei tzalmavet lo-ira ra ki-ata imadi

lessons.gloss: Even if I walk through the valley of deep shadow, I shall not fear evil, for you are with me.
lessons.focus: Introduce צַלְמָוֶת (deep shadow, death-shadow). Reinforce imadi (with me).

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Goodness and Mercy Shall Follow Me

verse.hebrew: אַךְ טוֹב וָחֶסֶד יִרְדְּפוּנִי כָּל־יְמֵי חַיָּי
verse.translit: ach tov va-chesed yirdefuni kol-yemei chayai

lessons.gloss: Surely goodness and chesed shall pursue me all the days of my life.
lessons.focus: Reinforce chesed from Journey 3 lesson 54. Introduce ר־ד־פ (to pursue). A strong convergent moment: chesed anchored in Exodus 34 now appears in Psalm 23.

games.raw: Chant Along, Chesed Highlight (special treatment), Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites Psalm 23:6 and names chesed.

lessons.title: Create in Me a Clean Heart
lessons.gloss: Create in me a clean heart, O God.
lessons.focus: Reinforce ב־ר־א from Journey 1 lesson 1. Introduce טָהוֹר (clean, pure). A weighty echo: the creation verb now applied to the heart.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort (b-r-a now both cosmos and heart), Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites Psalm 51:12 and names the creation echo.

lessons.title: Restore the Joy of Thy Salvation
lessons.gloss: Restore to me the joy of your salvation.
lessons.focus: Reinforce sh-v-b in Hiphil imperative. Reinforce y-sh-a (noun yesha / yish'echa, your salvation). Introduce שָׂשׂוֹן (joy, a fifth joy-word).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: I Will Establish Thy Throne Forever
lessons.gloss: And I will establish the throne of his kingdom forever.
lessons.focus: Reinforce k-v-n (to establish). Introduce כִּסֵּא (throne). Reinforce mamlacha. The Davidic covenant.

games.raw: Chant Along, Construct Chain Builder, Covenant Vocabulary Review, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: And Thy House Shall Be Established
lessons.gloss: And your house and your kingdom shall be established forever.
lessons.focus: Reinforce a-m-n in Niphal ne'eman (established, faithful). A critical covenant verse.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort (a-m-n family: emet, emunah, ne'eman, amen), Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child names four words from the a-m-n family.

lessons.title: Give Thy Servant an Understanding Heart
lessons.gloss: And you shall give your servant a hearing heart.
lessons.focus: Reinforce lev shomea (hearing heart), a uniquely Hebrew idiom for wisdom. Solomon's famous prayer.

games.raw: Chant Along, Idiom Highlight, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: The Two Mothers

verse.hebrew: וַתֹּאמֶר הָאִשָּׁה אֲשֶׁר־בְּנָהּ הַחַי אֶל־הַמֶּלֶךְ כִּי־נִכְמְרוּ רַחֲמֶיהָ עַל־בְּנָהּ
verse.translit: va-tomer ha-isha asher-bnah ha-chai el-ha-melech ki-nikhmeru rachameha al-bnah

lessons.gloss: And the woman whose son was the living one said to the king, for her compassion yearned upon her son.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Niphal nikhmeru (were kindled, yearned). Reinforce rachamim (plural of rechem, womb, as compassion). Connect to rachum / rachem from Journey 3 and Journey 4.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort (r-ch-m family: womb, compassion, merciful one), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child names three words from the r-ch-m family.

lessons.title: Solomon Built the House
lessons.gloss: And he built the house to the LORD.
lessons.focus: Reinforce b-n-h. Introduce בַּיִת (house) as the temple-house usage.

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes "the house" as the temple.

lessons.title: The Holy of Holies
lessons.gloss: For the holy of holies.
lessons.focus: Reinforce kodesh. Introduce the construct superlative kodesh ha-kodashim (holiest of all, literally holy of the holies). A key Hebrew grammatical pattern (superlative by construct).

games.raw: Chant Along, Superlative Construct Highlight, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child forms a superlative by construct (king of kings, song of songs, etc.).

lessons.title: The Glory of the LORD Filled the House
lessons.gloss: And the glory of the LORD filled the house of the LORD.
lessons.focus: Reinforce kavod from Journey 3 lesson 52. Introduce מ־ל־א (to fill). The temple's theophanic moment.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Has God Indeed Dwelt on Earth
lessons.gloss: Will God indeed dwell upon the earth?
lessons.focus: Introduce the emphatic interrogative ha-umnam (indeed?). Reinforce y-sh-v.

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Forgive Thy People

verse.hebrew: וְשָׁמַעְתָּ אֶל־תְּחִנַּת עַבְדְּךָ וְעַמְּךָ יִשְׂרָאֵל וְסָלַחְתָּ
verse.translit: ve-shamata el-techinat avdecha ve-amcha Yisrael ve-salachta

lessons.gloss: And you shall hear the supplication of your servant and of your people Israel, and forgive.
lessons.focus: Introduce ח־נ־נ (noun תְּחִנָּה, supplication) in construct. Introduce ס־ל־ח (to forgive). Reinforce the forgiveness-vocabulary.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: The LORD Our God Be with Us

verse.hebrew: יְהִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ עִמָּנוּ כַּאֲשֶׁר הָיָה עִם־אֲבֹתֵינוּ
verse.translit: yehi YHVH Eloheinu imanu ka-asher haya im-avoteinu

lessons.gloss: May the LORD our God be with us as he was with our fathers.
lessons.focus: Reinforce the jussive yehi (may he be). A covenant-accompaniment formula.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: As the LORD Lives

verse.hebrew: חַי־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֲשֶׁר עָמַדְתִּי לְפָנָיו
verse.translit: chai-YHVH Elohei Yisrael asher amadti lefanav

lessons.gloss: As the LORD, God of Israel, lives, before whom I stand.
lessons.focus: Introduce the oath formula chai-YHVH (by the life of the LORD). Reinforce a-m-d.

games.raw: Chant Along, Oath Formula Highlight, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Answer Me, O LORD
lessons.gloss: Answer me, O LORD, answer me.
lessons.focus: Introduce ע־נ־ה (to answer) in imperative with 1cs suffix. Double invocation. Elijah on Carmel.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: The LORD, He Is God

verse.hebrew: יְהוָה הוּא הָאֱלֹהִים יְהוָה הוּא הָאֱלֹהִים
verse.translit: YHVH hu ha-Elohim YHVH hu ha-Elohim

lessons.gloss: The LORD, he is God; the LORD, he is God.
lessons.focus: The concluding refrain of the Carmel contest, doubled. Every word is familiar.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward (high priority; this refrain is sung at Yom Kippur).

lessons.exit: Child recites the refrain from memory.

lessons.title: A Still Small Voice
lessons.gloss: And after the fire, a sound of thin silence.
lessons.focus: Introduce דְּמָמָה (silence) and דַּק (thin, fine). A famously untranslatable phrase.

roots.raw: ד־מ־מ (to be silent), ד־ק־ק (to be thin).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: A Chariot of Fire and Horses of Fire
lessons.gloss: And behold, a chariot of fire and horses of fire.
lessons.focus: Introduce רֶכֶב (chariot) and סוּס (horse) in construct.

games.raw: Chant Along, Construct Chain Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Elisha, Elisha, My Father
lessons.gloss: My father, my father, the chariot of Israel and its horsemen.
lessons.focus: Introduce פָּרָשׁ (horseman). The mourning cry of Elisha at Elijah's departure.

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Naaman Dipped Seven Times
lessons.gloss: And he went down and dipped in the Jordan seven times.
lessons.focus: Reinforce y-r-d. Introduce ט־ב־ל (to dip, immerse).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: His Flesh Was Restored

verse.hebrew: וַיָּשָׁב בְּשָׂרוֹ כִּבְשַׂר נַעַר קָטֹן וַיִּטְהָר
verse.translit: va-yashov besaro ki-vsar na'ar katon va-yithar

lessons.gloss: And his flesh returned as the flesh of a small lad, and he was clean.
lessons.focus: Reinforce sh-v-b. Reinforce t-h-r from Journey 5 lesson 29 (in verb form now). Introduce קָטֹן (small).

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Those with Us Are More

verse.hebrew: אַל־תִּירָא כִּי רַבִּים אֲשֶׁר אִתָּנוּ מֵאֲשֶׁר אוֹתָם
verse.translit: al-tira ki rabim asher itanu me-asher otam

lessons.gloss: Do not fear, for those with us are more than those with them.
lessons.focus: Reinforce al-tira. Reinforce rav / rabim.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Open His Eyes
lessons.gloss: O LORD, open his eyes that he may see.
lessons.focus: Introduce פ־ק־ח (to open the eyes). Short, weighty petition.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: They Forsook the LORD
lessons.gloss: And they forsook all the commandments of the LORD their God.
lessons.focus: Reinforce a-z-b and mitzva in plural.

games.raw: Chant Along, Covenant Vocabulary Review, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Because They Obeyed Not
lessons.gloss: And they did not listen and stiffened their necks.
lessons.focus: Reinforce kshe-oref (stiff-necked) from Journey 3 lesson 50.

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 14 and recognizes the stiff-necked idiom from Exodus.

lessons.title: The Book of the Law Was Found
lessons.gloss: I have found the book of the Torah in the house of the LORD.
lessons.focus: Reinforce sefer and torah. Reinforce matzati from Journey 3 lesson 9 (or earlier matza). The discovery of Deuteronomy.

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 8 and names the "book of the torah."

lessons.title: He Read Aloud
lessons.gloss: And he read in their ears all the words of the book of the covenant.
lessons.focus: Reinforce q-r-a and sefer. Reinforce berit. A covenant-renewal moment.

games.raw: Chant Along, Covenant Vocabulary Review, Verse Builder.

lessons.title: Return, Ye Backsliding Children
lessons.gloss: Return, backsliding children.
lessons.focus: Reinforce sh-v-b in plural imperative. Introduce שׁוֹבָב (backsliding, Polel participle).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: I Will Make a New Covenant

verse.hebrew: הִנֵּה יָמִים בָּאִים וְכָרַתִּי בְּרִית חֲדָשָׁה
verse.translit: hineh yamim ba'im ve-charati berit chadasha

lessons.gloss: Behold, the days are coming, and I will cut a new covenant.
lessons.focus: Reinforce the covenant-cutting idiom from Genesis 15 (Journey 2 lesson 12). Reinforce chadasha (feminine of chadash). A major prophetic passage.

games.raw: Chant Along, Covenant Vocabulary Review, Intertextual Echo Highlight (cut a covenant from Abraham to Jeremiah), Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: I Will Write It on Their Heart
lessons.gloss: And upon their heart will I write it.
lessons.focus: Reinforce k-t-v. The interior covenant image.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: They Shall All Know Me
lessons.gloss: For all of them shall know me.
lessons.focus: Reinforce y-d-a. A defining promise of the new covenant.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.title: Consolidation Before Exit
lessons.gloss: Consolidation lesson. The child reads Psalm 23 in full and Joshua 1:6-9 in full.
lessons.focus: No new content.

games.raw: Memorization Showcase, Scroll Reader.

lessons.exit: Child reads Psalm 23 and Joshua 1:6-9 smoothly.

lessons.title: Journey 5 Exit: Psalm 23 and the Davidic Covenant
lessons.gloss: Journey 5 exit. The child reads Psalm 23 in full and 2 Samuel 7:12-16 (the Davidic covenant) aloud.
lessons.focus: All Journey 1-5 grammar and vocabulary consolidated.

games.raw: Final Scroll Reader, Memorization Showcase, Parent Submission Flow.

lessons.exit: Child records themselves reading Psalm 23 and 2 Sam 7:12-16. Parent approves. Journey 5 complete. Journey 6 (Covenant King) unlocks.
